response.original_title: Kate Dolan: A Different Kind of Unhinged
response.overview: This is my first show. And this is an intimate filming of it.  It's about my Mum. It's not perfect but neither am I.  Self produced with lots of help from friends after my management went bankrupt.  The aircon wasn't working in the basement club we hired, hence the sweat. Huge thanks to the live audiences who came out to shows all year xx
response.title: Kate Dolan: A Different Kind of Unhinged
